calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Holger Siegwart appeared for Petra Manz (objector).
Karishma Patel appeared via zoom for Joan Chisper (objector).

The Court denied the petition as petitioner is not a person entitled to letters.
Parties do not wish to file a petition due to no probate assets.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported.
